features: No need for pins or clips. Clings to hair and stays on
Strategically placed teeth help hair to dry and set fast.
description: Product Description County Sales Ltd County Sales has over 30 years experience in designing, sourcing and distributing health & beauty, cosmetics, shoecare and convenience store products We pride ourselves on having an excellent standard with product quality, availability and value for money our top priorities We offer a full product range development service from initial concepts through to delivery of the finished product CS Beauty Hair Rollers Easy to use, cling rollers for use on wet or dry hair. On wet hair, rough dry first with towel or hairdryer, simply section hair, wrap round rollers and the hook-and-loop material will keep hair/roller in place. Hair net may be used if sleeping in them. On dry hair, spray hair with setting lotion such as silhouette setting spray, wind in rollers and allow to dry naturally or blast with the hair dryer to speed process up. Qty: 42 Hair Rollers Size:Length 64mm, Diameter: 15mm No need for pins or clips. Clings to hair and stays on Strategically placed teeth help hair to dry and set fast.
